title: Uploaded Video Path
name: UploadedVideoPath
description: Select a video from the ComfyUI input directory and output its path.

title: Reference Text Loader
name: ReferenceTextLoader
description: Load reference text from txt, srt, ass, or vtt files in the ComfyUI input directory.

title: Speech/Text Consistency QC API
name: SpeechTextConsistencyQC
description: Transcribe video speech through an API, translate it to Chinese, and compare it with line-based reference text.

title: QC Text Viewer/Saver
name: QCTextViewerSaver
description: Display qc_report or qc_json in the ComfyUI UI and optionally save it as a txt file.
